name: Alchemer Survey & Research API
what_it_does: Alchemer (formerly SurveyGizmo) REST API for advanced survey and research platform. Enables AI agents to create and manage surveys, retrieve response data, access reporting analytics, and integrate survey intelligence into research and business workflows. Alchemer is positioned as a more powerful, enterprise-grade alternative to SurveyMonkey with extensive customization.
use_cases: Querying survey response data and analytics from market research agents
Managing survey creation and distribution from research workflow automation agents
Retrieving response trends and statistical analysis from insights analytics agents
Integrating Alchemer survey data into CRM and product feedback loop agents
not_for: Simple NPS surveys (Delighted or Wootric are simpler)
best_when: A market research or enterprise feedback team using Alchemer wants AI agents to manage surveys, retrieve response data, and integrate research insights into product and business workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Survey response data contains personal information. GDPR and CCPA compliance required for respondent data. Alchemer is mid-market/enterprise priced.

auth.notes: Alchemer API key + secret authentication. Keys generated in account settings. Request signing with key+secret pair.

pricing.notes: Mid-market survey platform with generous free tier. Per-user pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Alchemer API: rate limits per key; documented in API help

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Survey response PII requires GDPR/CCPA compliance
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
API key + secret signing required — more complex than simple API key auth
Healthcare survey data may be subject to HIPAA — verify respondent type
Rate limits apply — throttle for bulk response exports
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Survey response data with potential PII. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA. EU data residency. API key+secret signing.

security_score_components.security_notes: Survey response PII. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA. EU data residency. API key+secret signing.
